vat_note_text: VAT (15%) is excluded in the total amount

approve_general_manager_initial_confirma: Are you sure you want to approve this variation as supervisor?

reject_general_manager_confirmation: Are you sure you want to reject this variation as general manager? Please enter the rejection reason below.

bulk_reject_confirmation: Are you sure you want to reject
cannot_reject_pending_project_manager: Cannot reject variation in pending_project_manager status. Please approve first or wait for status change.
cannot_reject_current_status: Cannot reject variation in current status. Please check the variation status.
some_variations_cannot_be_rejected: Some variations cannot be rejected in their current status. Please unselect them and try again.

cannot_edit_approved_message: This variation has been finally approved and cannot be modified.
bulk_approve_confirmation: Are you sure you want to approve the selected variations?
bulk_approve_error: Bulk approve error! Not Allowed to approve some variations in their current status.
bulk_approve_partial: Some variations approved, some failed. Because of: pending approval from other managers
bulk_final_approve_confirmation: Are you sure you want to final approve the selected variations regardless of their current status?

cancel_variation_confirmation: Are you sure you want to cancel this variation?
cannot_edit_final_approved_variation: Cannot edit a final approved variation

variation_document_desc: The original variation document uploaded manually (PDF or image)

request_edit_desc: An edit request will be sent to the project manager for approval.
request_delete_desc: A delete request will be sent to the project manager for approval.
request_unapprove_desc: This will send an unapprove request to the approver responsible for the current approval step.
alteration_request_accepted: Request accepted and variation status updated

response_reason_required: State your reason for this decision (required)

variation_approval_revoked: Approval revoked. You can approve it again now.
previous_revisions_desc: Open an older saved version of this variation
ai_audit_advisory: Advisory comparison only. Your approval decision remains manual.
signed_copy_ready: A signed copy is ready for comparison.
signed_copy_stage_locked: Signed-copy upload is locked outside the Owner/Consultant approval stage.
